overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character in a suit walking through a futuristic neon-lit downtown district at night. The character traverses commercial plazas, ascends illuminated stairs, and moves through covered walkways with holographic advertisements.

scene_state.functional_zone: neon-lit commercial pedestrian street with holographic advertisements

events.description: character turns right to cross the street
vehicle with headlights passes by on the right

agents.ego_description: walking down the wide pedestrian street, then turning right to cross the road toward the hotel district

notable_agents.action: futuristic sedan driving past the intersection with headlights on

entered.detail: large floating digital advertisements displaying colorful neon imagery and text including BE YOUR BEST SELF
multi-level staircase with purple and cyan neon lighting accents
futuristic vending machine or service booth with glowing purple interface
wide paved sidewalk with geometric patterns and drainage grates

segments.scene_description: The character walks down a wide neon-lit commercial street surrounded by massive holographic billboards and futuristic architecture. The scene transitions as the character turns right to cross the road, passing a parked vehicle while approaching a hotel district.

scene_state.functional_zone: hotel forecourt with outdoor dining area

events.description: crosses from main street into hotel plaza area with outdoor seating

agents.ego_description: walking through the hotel plaza toward the entrance, passing outdoor dining tables

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in blue jacket walking past the character toward the street

entered.detail: illuminated hotel sign with Japanese characters 竜胆ホテル and English text The Ringer Hotel
large yellow umbrellas covering outdoor restaurant seating with purple chairs
modern glass and concrete hotel exterior with illuminated windows

segments.scene_description: The character enters a more intimate plaza space in front of The Ringer Hotel, marked by distinctive yellow dining canopies and Japanese signage. The environment shifts from the wide commercial street to a landscaped forecourt with outdoor seating and planters.

scene_state.functional_zone: illuminated transit stairway with neon railings

events.description: character begins ascending the illuminated staircase to upper level
reaches top of stairs and enters upper commercial deck

agents.ego_description: walking up the wide concrete stairs with glowing cyan railings toward the elevated plaza

entered.detail: wide staircase with textured concrete steps and integrated lighting
glass railings with bright cyan LED strip lighting along the handrails
modern glass and steel structure marking the top of the stairs

segments.scene_description: The character ascends a dramatic staircase illuminated by vibrant cyan neon railings, transitioning from the ground level plaza to an upper commercial deck. The stairway is flanked by modern glass architecture and offers views of the surrounding city towers.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated shopping and dining promenade with holographic displays

events.description: character descends stairs on the far side of the upper deck
enters covered walkway with glass ceiling displaying digital advertisements

agents.ego_description: walking through the upper commercial level, passing various digital vendors and descending to the main promenade

notable_agents.action: seated patron at outdoor cafe under white canopy

entered.detail: elevated pedestrian area with dark wooden plank flooring and integrated lighting
glass ceiling panels displaying shifting colorful digital advertisements and sky imagery
futuristic retail kiosks with glowing product displays and automated service windows
enclosed corridor with transparent roof and walls showing exterior city views

segments.scene_description: The character explores an elevated commercial promenade featuring wooden decking and a stunning holographic ceiling display. The area is populated with digital vendor stalls and outdoor seating, transitioning into a covered glass walkway lined with advertising panels.

scene_state.functional_zone: transitional corridor leading to exterior balcony with city views

events.description: lighting shifts from neon interior to natural night sky visible through exit

agents.ego_description: walking through the covered walkway toward the exterior exit, approaching the balcony overlooking the city

entered.detail: large glass doorway opening to outdoor balcony with view of distant corporate towers
tall illuminated skyscraper visible through the exit against the night sky
tropical trees visible through the glass exit, indicating exterior landscaping

segments.scene_description: The character moves through a transitional corridor with glass walls toward an exterior exit, where palm trees and a massive distant corporate tower become visible against the night sky. The environment shifts from enclosed commercial space to an open balcony with panoramic city views.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a neon-drenched futuristic district that transitions from a wide commercial thoroughfare to an elevated open-air balcony. It begins on a broad street dominated by massive holographic billboards, moving past a parked vehicle as the character turns toward a hotel district. The scene then shifts into the intimate, landscaped forecourt of The Ringer Hotel, characterized by yellow dining canopies and Japanese signage, before ascending a dramatic staircase with vibrant cyan neon railings. As the camera reaches the upper deck, the environment opens into an elevated promenade with wooden decking and a holographic ceiling, eventually narrowing into a glass-walled corridor. The movement finally leads through an exterior exit onto an open balcony, where the enclosed commercial space gives way to a panoramic night view of palm trees and a distant corporate tower.
